title: Wildfowling strategy template
body: "You must make sure wildfowling does not cause significant disturbance to wintering birds if:   you plan to carry out wildfowling on your land your land is in Countryside Stewardship Higher Tier (CSHT) action  CGS19: Manage wet grassland for wintering waders and wildfowl or  CGS20: Manage wet grassland for breeding waders    Use the wildfowling strategy template to plan your sustainable wildfowling strategy.   Keep a separate record of your bag returns.  You must provide these if Natural England ask for them.  "
